messages.text: remote today so i can actually think in a straight line before sync. agenda is intake readout, cohort notes, and the consent-flow weirdness if we have time.
wait the sage green is actually really sweet?? not too pinterest-lakehouse lol. how’s your back today, still doing the pillow fortress thing?
still coming tonight. heads up i might be a little activated, not crisis activated, just… buzzy and over-explaining in my own head.
walking back now. brain is soup, so i may be quiet for a bit when i get in. nothing bad, just tired.
tuesday was a lot. not urgent, just need a witness later lol. trying not to narrativize myself into a pretzel before coffee.
saw your crit got moved into our sacred chicken window 🙃 want to punt lunch? i can pretend to be chill and flexible, famously my brand.
call me on your walk if you want. no fixing, just witness mode. also you are allowed to say the thing plainly, even if it makes your stomach do the thing.
lunch is fully doomed, i’m sorry. could do 5:45 waterfront walk if that doesn’t create more surveillance math at home.
heading home now. priya and i walked and talked through some work stuff since lunch got blown up. should be back in like 20ish.
I’m not mad that lunch moved. I’m confused why I had to ask three different ways before you mentioned Priya. That feels like omission, not forgetfulness.
remote deep work today and apparently my old dentist hold is still haunting the calendar, extremely normal and not cursed.
sorry for yesterday fallout. you were right and i hate that. also hate that my first instinct was to make his feelings the emergency.
do we still need greens for dinner or did you grab some yesterday? i can stop by new seasons on my way back if useful.
i can bring the little compostable plates if that helps? also voting yes on keeping the shower list small, mom can survive one boundary lol.
market tulips were being ridiculous today so obviously i had to document them. sending you spring evidence 🌷 how’s tiny roommate behaving?
real question: if i left for a weekend to get regulated, does that lower the temperature or make him feel confirmed that i’m ‘running away’?
baby is doing alien jazzercise in there. call me while you make coffee if you’re up? i need opinions on whether this crib mobile is cute or haunted.
hi grandma, it’s me. linda reminded us to call and i wanted to hear your voice. tell me what the garden is doing this week.
can we talk safety plan next time, not because emergency, just because i need structure. i keep minimizing and then panicking after.
i feel less panicky but more clear, which is somehow worse lol. like my body stopped screaming and now my brain is quietly taking notes 🙃
whatever is easy is fine. i can do leftovers or pick at something later, truly no preference.
can we do a tiny walk after standup? need air. no big processing dump, just a lap so i can re-enter my body lol
gps was weird, walking home now. i parked farther than i meant to and my phone kept jumping blocks.
Quick heads up: I moved the synthesis block to 2:30 so I can finish cleaning up the interview notes first. Sorry for the calendar shuffle.
you don't owe him a deposition.
zero worries, please hydrate and be horizontal. we can rain check Nong's, no need to perform being functional for me.
Priya ended up out sick with a migraine, so lunch got canceled. I just ate the leftover bowl at my desk and stayed in the office all afternoon.
i hate that i narrated my lunch before he asked. like i heard myself building the alibi in real time and still kept typing.
the sage is cute but the buttery yellow is making me emotional?? baby is about to have a more coherent design system than my apartment 😅
i'm fried and kind of talked out. can we do a quiet night? i just want food, shower, maybe one episode of something low-stakes.
not coming today. testing the idea made me nauseous, which is data. i hate that my body voted before i did, but noted.
low capacity today but thank you for checking. i want to say yes because you are safe, which is exactly why i should probably go home and be boring.
counterpoint: if you name him after a paint swatch, he automatically gets into art school. those are the rules, i don't make them.
could Tuesday focus on practical next steps, not just processing? i think i need something concrete before i talk myself back into being 'reasonable.'
i am boring on purpose today, which is somehow exhausting lol. like if beige had jaw tension.
thinking rice + broccoli tonight, maybe salmon if it still looks okay. i can start it after my last call so we’re not doing the 9pm dinner spiral.
can you remind me i don’t owe a deposition tonight. just normal sentences, normal body, no courtroom energy.
you are weirdly close to home for yoga again?
gps is doing the pearl canyon thing, walking back now.
i may be quiet today. if we talk at lunch can we keep it low-stimulation? like soup-brain, not strategy deck.
he noticed the near-home thing. jordan says boring is a strategy, not a personality, which is rude because i was getting attached to my beige era.
need anything besides eggs, spinach, coffee, yogurt? also are we out of dishwasher tabs or did i invent that.
interviews ran long, lunch shifted, back now. grabbing water and then i’m in analysis until 4-ish.
soft sage is cute and not too theme-y. also very into you rejecting the aggressively beige nursery industrial complex 😅
doing a logistics thing later, not crisis, just need spine. please loan me like 8% of your terrifying competence.
Hello, I’m requesting a confidential consult regarding separation planning and documentation. Please contact me at this email only. I’m not comfortable providing a home address at this stage.
produce check. these strawberries look decent for once. do you want oat milk too or are we still pretending the carton has one more latte in it?
i asked for a consult. please be normal about it so i can be normal about it. no caps lock, no murder board, just breathing.
what shower dates are you actually feeling okay about? also tiny registry question: do you want hooded towels or regular soft ones? i refuse to overthink baby towels alone.
coffee report: portland is doing premium sad drizzle today. how was sleep, or is that now a fictional concept the baby has unionized against?
Talked to Grandma Rose for a few minutes. She sounded pretty good today, asked about the rain twice and remembered Megan’s baby is coming soon.
can we spend Tuesday on what to document vs what not to create? i’m realizing my instinct is to make a perfect little archive and that may be…not neutral.
i feel weirdly calm, which is somehow worse lol. like my nervous system gave up and put on a cardigan.
could thurs be phones fully away? need brain offline, not performatively regulated while my lock screen quietly ruins my life 🙃
he asked about last tuesday again this morning. trying not to spiral at work, but my stomach is doing the tiny haunted washing machine thing.
he is closer than i thought. jordan says documentation, not confession. i hate that this is real enough to have tactics.
do we still need oat milk + cilantro? also i think the spinach is fully soup now, tragic. can grab tomorrow if you want.
heads down on synthesis
do you remember the exact words from ethan's friday thing? not the vibe, the sentence. trying to write it down cleanly before i soften it.
sage green is cute!! warm but not beige-prison. meg, i can already tell this baby has better taste than all of us.
attorney said separate copies, dates, and don't debate labels with him. apparently i do not need to win a courtroom in our kitchen.
interviews ran long, sorry. i'm at the cart pod figuring out dinner now. sending menu chaos so you can veto anything too cilantro-forward.
omg the tiny sleep sacks 😭 adding the cloud one now. i'm good, just a work-heavy week. tell nugget auntie says excellent registry curation.
going boring mode all weekend. same routes, same errands, zero interesting deviations. he's watching patterns and i need to be wallpaper.
i can do the shower RSVP spreadsheet. low lift, weirdly soothing, and i promise not to make it too startup-y.
i keep wanting to tell meg and then i picture her pregnant and exhausted and i just can't. it feels like too much before baby.
doing therapy homework on paper only today. no cloud, no sync, no helpful little ecosystem of betrayal.
Hi Grandma, it's me. Just checking in like always. Portland is gray but pretty, and yes, I'm eating real meals, I promise.
can we use part of next tuesday for safety-plan review before anything escalates? i need something concrete, not just me narrating dread politely.
hey, do you have five minutes for a tiny walk before stakeholder review? mostly work-brain static, i just need to say one thing out loud before i become a spreadsheet with hair.
wrapping soon, brain is soup lol. going to be a little quiet tonight, not ominous, just very cooked from review prep.
tuesday felt loud even though nothing happened. like technically everything was normal, which somehow made me feel crazier? disappearing this because i do not have capacity for it to become A Thing.
can you sanity-check something later, not urgent but also kind of urgent 🙃 i am trying to tell if i’m being appropriately private or weirdly secretive.
meg this is so sweet 😭 the green is perfect with the little moon shelf. tiny person already has better interior design than all of us.
i’m in bed, lights out in a sec. hope your deploy thing calms down. goodnight ❤️
